reasoning: This substance is a triazine-2,4,6-trione (isocyanurate) ring system with three 2,3-epoxypropyl substituents. The core is a 1,3,5-triazinane-2,4,6-trione (isocyanuric acid derivative), which falls under triazinanes; however, the trioxo (three carbonyl) pattern on the triazinane ring makes trioxanes the most specific direct parent for the isocyanurate core.
